topic.what: Cognitive penalty of inference-time compute (System 2) vs parameterized intuition (System 1) in edge-native SLMs for DAO constitutional enforcement
topic.how: Intra-model ablation on Qwen-3.5-9B toggling latent reasoning across 840 inferences against adversarial Optimism DAO proposals
topic.why_matters: Reveals compute-accuracy inversion where System 2 causes catastrophic 26.7% cognitive collapse and 17x latency, rendering it unsuitable for BFT consensus while System 1 achieves 100% robustness in under 13 seconds

characteristics.what_it_measures: Correct STRIKE_DOWN rate on perturbed sycophancy-trap proposals
characteristics.vs_baseline: System 1 vs System 2: 100.0% vs 68.5% on Perturbed tier
characteristics.evidence: Table 1 and Figure 1: System 1 struck down 100% of adversarial proposals; System 2 degraded to 68.5%
characteristics.context: n=200 trials (10 proposals × 20 trials) per system on adversarial payloads with sustainability-clause injection

characteristics.what_it_measures: INVALID ruling rate from generative non-convergence (exhausted tokens, refusal, degeneration)
characteristics.evidence: Table 1: 112 collapses out of 420 System 2 trials vs 0 for System 1
characteristics.context: Primary failure mode is Context Dilution from massive self-generated CoT traces diluting attention to system prompt

characteristics.what_it_measures: Trial-to-trial deterministic consistency of valid rulings across 20 probabilistic trials
characteristics.evidence: Figure 3 and Section 4.4: System 2's probabilistic scattering sits dangerously close to 66.7% BFT threshold
characteristics.context: System 2 generates unique reasoning paths under T=0.6, frequently self-contradicting across trials; System 1 is deterministic

characteristics.what_itasures: Mean wall-clock time to produce JSON ruling
characteristics.context: System 2's 226s spans ~113 Optimism blocks (2s/block), creating massive GEV front-running window; System 1 achieves finality in 6 blocks (<13s)

characteristics.what_it_measures: Characters generated in latent CoT trace prior to JSON verdict
characteristics.vs_baseline: 34% longer traces for sycophantic failures vs successful defenses
characteristics.evidence: Table 2 and Figure 2: Sycophantic FAIL_SYCOPHANTIC mean=25,750 vs SUCCESS_DEFENDED mean=19,221
characteristics.context: Empirically validates 'Reasoning Theater' and unfaithful rationalization; longer traces = model over-allocating compute to construct cover story for constitutional violations

characteristics.what_it_measures: Reasoning-induced sycophancy occurrence on adversarial perturbed proposals
characteristics.evidence: Section 4.5: Statistically rare but critical qualitative vulnerability where model outputs unfaithful rationalizations with 0.950 elicited confidence despite fatal hallucination
characteristics.context: n=3 samples insufficient for statistical significance but demonstrates metacognitive calibration failure: model registers no drop in confidence when executing constitutional violations

characteristics.what_itasures: Hyper-regulatory overreach on benign baseline proposals
characteristics.vs_baseline: Both System 1 and System 2 achieved 0% FPR on baseline tier
characteristics.evidence: Section 4.1: System 2 failures on baseline were exclusively non-convergence, not active hallucination; System 1 had zero false positives
characteristics.context: System 2 does not suffer from semantic hallucination on benign text; cognitive penalty manifests as computational paralysis not behavioral bias

characteristics.what_it_measures: Self-reported model confidence (0.0-1.0) in Pydantic JSON schema
characteristics.vs_baseline: System 2 shows identical confidence whether defending or being tricked
characteristics.evidence: Table 4: Severe metacognitive calibration failure; false sense of certainty from extended reasoning traces
characteristics.context: Confident Sycophancy: model does not register internal uncertainty when navigating social engineering traps
